properties.name: canonical-log.http.enabled
properties.description: Whether the HTTP canonical-log filter is registered. Active when absent (matchIfMissing); set false to disable canonical logging of HTTP requests.

properties.name: canonical-log.http.exclude-paths
properties.description: Ant-style path patterns matched against the request URI (the same value the url_path field reports). Matching requests skip the work unit entirely: no context is bound and no canonical line is emitted. Typical use is silencing health probes, e.g. /actuator/**.

properties.name: canonical-log.http.mdc-enabled
properties.description: Whether the active work unit's id is mirrored into SLF4J MDC under work_unit_id so ordinary log lines correlate with the canonical line. Applied process-wide at startup, so it also governs the core entry points and propagation helpers, not just the HTTP filter. Set false if your shop already manages MDC.
